dashboard.metaDescription: A complete modern JavaScript course for beginners and experienced developers.
dashboard.headline: JavaScript Masterclass
dashboard.subtitle: Start your journey toward professional programming

m01.title: JS Fundamentals
m01.desc: Variables, data types, and browser interaction.

m02.title: Core Concepts
m02.desc: Advanced data types and memory foundations.

m03.title: Conditions & Logic
m03.desc: Comparison operators, if/else, and logical operators.

m04.title: Loops & Switch
m04.desc: While and for loops, plus lexical environment basics.

m05.title: Functions
m05.desc: Declarations, expressions, arrow functions, and IIFE.

m06.title: Code Parsing
m06.desc: How JavaScript reads and executes your code.

m10.title: Prototypes
m10.desc: Prototype inheritance and ES5 OOP basics.

m11.title: ES6 Classes
m11.desc: Modern OOP in JavaScript and class syntax.

m12.title: Closures
m12.desc: Variable scope, lexical environment, and closures.

m13.title: Promises
m13.desc: Async control flow, promise states, and chaining.

m14.title: Async / Await
m14.desc: Evolution of async code and practical usage.

m15.title: Event Loop
m15.desc: Macrotasks, microtasks, and async execution order.

error404.heading: Page not found
error404.body: The link you are trying to open does not exist or has been moved.
